scope.purpose: Incremental PL Commentary Bank athlete research audit; preserve confirmed-vs-candidate separation.

repositorySafety.reasonDatabaseNotModified: No new source-linked rows met the confirmation threshold for direct database.json promotion in this small batch.
repositorySafety.reasonCandidatesNotModified: No ambiguous finding with enough detail was found to justify a candidate row.

sourcePolicy.confirmationRule: Do not infer identity or achievements from name-only matches; require official or high-trust source details sufficient to link the roster athlete to the result row.
sourcePolicy.candidateRule: Name-only, ambiguous, or insufficiently linked findings must remain outside database.json and be routed to research-candidates.json only when there is a concrete source row to preserve.
